blocks.text: Match-fixing shock: Eliteserien players arrested as Norwegian football reels

Seven arrested for match-fixing, Norwegian top-flight players among those charged. Days after Bodø/Glimt's stunning 2-1 away win at Inter in the Champions League — Norwegian football's wildest week takes a dark turn.
🎿 Biathlon WC — Men's 20km Individual — JT Bø, Lægreid, Tarjei Bø — Kontiolahti 16:10
🏅 Paralympic Winter Games 2026 — Opening Ceremony — Milano-Cortina 20:00
